steps.t: To safely enter Emax Dûl, you must be escorted across the bridge by Kotráka Saiya. You should talk to Kotráka Saiya at the bridge-fort when you are re…
You have arrived inside the palace. You should talk to Kotráka Saiya.
You need to secure the safety of Kotráka Saiya's family by getting them out of the palace. You should find Kotráka Saiya's three daughters and son, Ot…
You need to secure the safety of Kotráka Saiya's family by getting them out of the palace. You should find Khêjiba somewhere in the palace royal quart…
Kotráka Saiya's sister, Barkhuráni, will not allow her to leave with the children. You should defeat Dark Priestess Barkhuráni.
You have secured the safety of the royal family. You should talk to Kotráka Saiya.
You have secured the safety of the royal family. You should return to the entrance of the royal quarters and speak to the servant standing by.
Kotráka Saiya will now hold up her end of the deal and show you the secret way into the city. You should speak to Kotráka Saiya and meet up with your …
Mizâdi has set up camp at the secret entrance to the city. You should talk to Mizâdi at Nashûbu.
